form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 61 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.3 len at this track February 4 over 1000m defeating Peace Of Mind with 62kg at $3.30. The race before that 2nd of 10 at this track on December 24 over 1000m, neck behind Palace Gift with 58kg at $5. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Racing well recently. Comes off a 61 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.3 len at this track February 4 over 1000m defeating Peace Of Mind with 62kg at $3.30. The race before that 2nd of 10 at this track on December 24 over 1000m, neck behind Palace Gift with 58kg at $5. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 0.5 len behind Lady Look Alike with 58kg at $5.50. Before that 9th of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 5 len behind Spirit with 59kg at $67. Doesn?t need to improve much to play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Last start 3rd of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 0.5 len behind Lady Look Alike with 58kg at $5.50. Before that 9th of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 5 len behind Spirit with 59kg at $67. Doesn?t need to improve much to play a big role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 150m, rolled out and had to be steadied away from the heels of Azzurri.
Shortly after the start, buffeted One Liner.
Shortly after the start, made contact with Commanding.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 2nd of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, head behind Spirit carrying 60kg at $41. Second-up ran last of 7 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1250m, 4 len behind What A Fortune carrying 55.5kg at $6. Has shown enough ability in the past to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 2nd of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, head behind Spirit carrying 60kg at $41. Second-up ran last of 7 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1250m, 4 len behind What A Fortune carrying 55.5kg at $6. Has shown enough ability in the past to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Taken in behind runners from its wide draw in the early stages.
Raced green, was hanging out from the 300m.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently won by a long-neck at Durbanville March 18 over 1250m defeating Sooty with 56kg at $11. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1250m defeating Star World with 60.5kg at $5. This is well within her grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently won by a long-neck at Durbanville March 18 over 1250m defeating Sooty with 56kg at $11. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1250m defeating Star World with 60.5kg at $5. This is well within her grasp.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with Rahhabba in the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 11 len behind Spirit carrying 58.5kg at $101. Second run from a spell second last of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 4.5 len behind Lady Look Alike with 52.5kg at $51. Not doing enough of late to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third-up today. Resuming ran last of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 11 len behind Spirit carrying 58.5kg at $101. Second run from a spell second last of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 4.5 len behind Lady Look Alike with 52.5kg at $51. Not doing enough of late to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Took an awkward stride away from the inside running rail leaving the 800m.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at this track December 10 over 1000m, 8 len behind Demanding Dave carrying 54kg at $15. Previously first up; second of 9 at Durbanville September 22 over 1000m, a 0.1 lengths behind Steadfast with 60kg at $4. Prefer to see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at this track December 10 over 1000m, 8 len behind Demanding Dave carrying 54kg at $15. Previously first up; second of 9 at Durbanville September 22 over 1000m, a 0.1 lengths behind Steadfast with 60kg at $4. Prefer to see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped outwards and slow into stride.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at this track December 21 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind All The Rage carrying 54.5kg at $13.50. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at this track November 26 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind One Liner carrying 55kg at $21. Might need the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at this track December 21 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind All The Rage carrying 54.5kg at $13.50. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at this track November 26 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind One Liner carrying 55kg at $21. Might need the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, carried outwards by Riverstone.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last of 12 at this track January 4 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Foudre carrying 57kg at $4.50. On debut second of 14 at this track November 19 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Foudre carrying 59kg at $5.50. Has solid claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming. Not seen since he finished last of 12 at this track January 4 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Foudre carrying 57kg at $4.50. On debut second of 14 at this track November 19 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Foudre carrying 59kg at $5.50. Has solid claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start, contact was made by United Front which jumped awkwardly inwards.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation winning won by 0.8 len this track December 24 over 1500m defeating Blue Steel with 59kg at $1.50. On debut sixth of 17 at this track June 12 over 1200m, soft track; 7 len behind Late December carrying 57kg at $151. Looking to others for the winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation winning won by 0.8 len this track December 24 over 1500m defeating Blue Steel with 59kg at $1.50. On debut sixth of 17 at this track June 12 over 1200m, soft track; 7 len behind Late December carrying 57kg at $151. Looking to others for the winner.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 12 weeks. Finished off last campaign seventh of 11 at this track January 13 over 1000m, 2 len behind Demanding Dave with 57kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Durbanville September 3 over 1000m, 3 len behind Elusive Winter carrying 55.5kg at $5.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 12 weeks. Finished off last campaign seventh of 11 at this track January 13 over 1000m, 2 len behind Demanding Dave with 57kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Durbanville September 3 over 1000m, 3 len behind Elusive Winter carrying 55.5kg at $5.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, buffeted between Star Major and Street Outlaw.
Trippi's Silk raced onto its heels approaching the 600m.
